scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-bold text-text
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-text

button.primary: bg-[#F57B2C] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-transform duration-200
button.secondary: bg-[#2DAEBB] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-transform duration-200

card.product: bg-white rounded-[32px] p-6 shadow-sm border border-border/40 hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-2 transition-all duration-300 flex flex-col items-center text-center
card.feature: bg-[#F9FAFB] rounded-[32px] p-8 border border-border/40 shadow-sm

header.nav: fixed w-full top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-border/20 shadow-sm py-4

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a fully responsive ecommerce site using pure React + Tailwind for front-end structure and Shadcn for complex interactions (if any, like admin data tables). Apply a playful, kids-friendly design (Archetype 6: Vibrant Play) with soft radiuses and the strict Kalam brand colors. Important: The project is a .js based React setup, do not output .tsx files.
instructions_to_main_agent.colors_usage: Use #F57B2C for primary Call To Actions (Add to Cart, Checkout). Use #2DAEBB and #FBD40B as secondary accents and fun badges/icons. Use #2390B6 ONLY as a full-bleed section background (e.g., in a featured banner or footer) to maintain a light, airy page background (#FFFFFF). Main heading text MUST use #8A6A9F, but body text should use a slightly darker tint for readability if #8A6A9F fails contrast checks against white.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import 'Fredoka' for headings and 'Nunito' for body text from Google Fonts. If Google Fonts are restricted, use standard rounded sans-serif fallbacks.
instructions_to_main_agent.images: Use the provided logo for the header and footer. Use the hero banner for the landing page. Pre-seed the MongoDB database with the 4 product URLs provided. For the about/brand story section, use the lifestyle images of kids drawing.
instructions_to_main_agent.motion: Implement playful hover states. Buttons should bounce or lift slightly (-translate-y-1). Product cards should lift and drop a soft shadow on hover.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Ensure EVERY interactive element has a unique 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='checkout-name-input').
instructions_to_main_agent.checkout_flow: Keep it simple. Cart -> Checkout Form (Name, Address, Phone, COD option explicitly stating Cash on Delivery only) -> Order Confirmation Page. No payment gateway logic, just a mock order submission to the backend.
instructions_to_main_agent.admin_panel: Path: /adminkalam. Needs basic login. Once logged in, show a dashboard with two tabs or sections: Products (CRUD) and Orders (View list and update status: Pending, Shipped, Delivered). Apply the same playful design language but structured in a functional dashboard format.
